name: open-dashboard
description: Open Dashboard — an `add-component` catalogue of 35+ copy-ready admin UI shapes (CRUD, detail, master-detail, kanban, calendar, wizard, billing, RBAC, i18n, …) plus operation skills (scaffold, crud-resource, data-source, backend-preset, rebrand, tests). The shapes compose on top of the scaffold-dashboard foundation (a TanStack Start back-office substrate).

plugins.name: open-dashboard
plugins.description: The full Open Dashboard skill catalogue — the `add-component` skill (a retriever over 35+ UI shapes: forms, lists & tables, kanban/calendar/tree/timeline, detail & pages, display & feedback, RBAC/auth/i18n/billing/search/realtime) plus the operation skills (scaffold-dashboard, add-crud-resource, add-data-source, add-backend-preset, rebrand, add-tests). The shapes assume the scaffold-dashboard base (TanStack Start + the platform layer) — run scaffold-dashboard first, then compose the shapes on top.
